figures.title: Command status
figures.caption: The recorded command exit code is 2.
figures.limitation: Diagnostic execution status only; this is not a benchmark or quality measurement.

figures.title: Execution evidence counts
figures.caption: Counts summarize observable evidence channels captured by the run.
figures.limitation: Counts are inferred from run files and do not measure correctness, latency or model quality.

figures.title: Prompt execution sequence
figures.caption: The sequence shows prompt/request evidence and the captured command outcome.
figures.limitation: The sequence is categorical and chronological; it does not score response quality.
